events.title: Bri & The Sparkling Diamonds: New Orleans Burlesque
events.description: Glamorous, sensual, and unforgettable—an all-Black neo-burlesque night that sparkles from start to finish.

events.title: AVANT HARDE: Outré Cabaret & Burlesque
events.description: Avant-garde, outrageous burlesque, drag & cabaret. Otherworldly delights & sensational sights.

events.title: Freaklesque
events.description: Freaklesque is a cabaret of the strangest, silliest burlesque acts that our New Orleans performers have to offer. Sexy creatures abound!

events.title: Le Vampyre Cabaret! New Orleans most infamous Vampire Burlesque Show
events.venue: The AllWays Lounge & Cabaret  (The Twilight Room)
events.description: The Thing to do in NOLA!  LIVE Music LIVE Theater LIVE Burlesque with your new favorite Spooky, Sexy, & Silly Vampires !

events.title: Through the AllWays Looking Glass!  A Fantastical Variety Show
events.description: Get ready to be transported to a magical surreal world full of sexy surprises and wacky wonders at Through the AllWays Looking Glass!

events.title: Ficheras: Live Latin Band & Burlesque
events.venue: The AllWays Lounge & Cabaret, Saint Claude Avenue, New Orleans, LA, USA
events.description: Get ready for a night of sultry Latin rhythms and seductive burlesque performances with Ficheras!

events.title: Illuminations: Burlesque in the Dark
events.description: Madam Kennedy presents; a variety show for those that love the dark, and the light within. Featuring: Fire, LEDs, Blacklight and much more.

events.title: Drag Queen Sip and Paint New Orleans The Drag Queen Paint experience
events.description:
Drag Queen Sip N Paint by Sip and Paint USA
Welcome to Drag Queen Sip N Paint, a fabulous experience brought to you by Sip and Paint USA

events.venue: Illusions the Drag Queen Brunch New Orleans
events.description: Illusions The Drag Brunch New Orleans - Drag Queen Brunch Show - NOLA

events.title: Psychedelic Speakeasy Burlesque
events.description: Immerse yourself in a surreal evening of burlesque & performance art filled with untold delights, vibrant colors & outrageous acts!

events.title: Nicolita Presents: Monthly Variety Show
events.description: Every second Tuesday 10pm Nicolita Presents & immersive art spectacle for your viewing pleasure.

events.title: Lefty Lucy's Burlesque Bingo
events.description: Chock full of fun facts, bad jokes & Strip Tease, this game is a whirlwind of wholesome good times blended with the cheeky sass of Burlesque

events.title: Bodice Rippers Burlesque
events.description: A Burlesque Show and Book Club In One!

events.title: STARS OF THE STARS
events.description: A monthly zodiac-themed variety show!

events.title: The Big Damn Show
events.description: New Orleans' #1 comedy thrill-show  featuring nationally recognized Drag & Burlesque artists, Magic Illusions,circus acts & sideshow stunts!

events.title: Studio 504: A Night of Disco Burlesque & Drag @ The Allways
events.description: Get ready for an unforgettable night of disco enchantment at Studio 504: Disco fantasy Burlesque & Drag @ The Allways

events.title: Burning Hell Burlesque - Rock & Roll Burlesque Show
events.description: Burning Hell Burlesque - New Orleans’ original rock-and-roll burlesque institution

events.title: Cannabis Cabaret
events.description: FoxyRose Productions Presents: Cannabis Cabaret! An evening full of smoking hot burlesque!

events.title: The Vampire Travesty Show!  A Le Vampyre Cabaret production
events.description: Buckle up my beauties, for a fangtastic night of macabre performances, intoxicating music, & spooky surprises from these sexy & silly Vamps!

events.title: Show Me Your Noobs
events.description: Looking for the Next Burlesque Sensation? See Show Me Your Noobs, a monthly showcase featuring newer local Burlesque, Drag & Variety talent.

events.title: Sundown Striptease
events.description: A monthly showcase of New Orleans' best macabre and avant garde variety acts!

events.title: LEGS! A Comedy & Burlesque Show
events.description: See your favorite performers STRETCH! 3 Comics! 1 Burlesque Dancer! A Good-Long Time! Join us at the iconic Allways Lounge & Cabaret !

events.title: French Quarter Cabaret A Variety Burlesque Experience
events.description: A glittery mix of song, dance, & burlesque in the heart of NOLA. Free, fun, and queer - French Quarter Cabaret lights up every 4th Friday!

events.title: Burlesque Bingo @ Abita New Orleans
events.description: Join us for a night of sultry entertainment and bingo with a twist at Burlesque Bingo @Abita New Orleans!

events.title: KAPOW: Burlesque, Drag & Variety with a BANG!
events.description: A powerhouse entertainment experience featuring a rotating cast of award winning burlesque, drag and variety artists that pack a punch!

events.title: Disney Channel Drag Show: A Nostalgic Spectacular!
events.description: Disney Channel nostalgia meets DRAG! ✨ HSM, Hannah, Cheetah Girls & more! April 26, 7PM @ Allways Lounge! 21+

events.title: Rock N Romance Revue
events.description: Rock N Romance Revue will be an evening of rockin burlesque performed to a live rock n roll band!

events.title: Mother's Day Drag Brunch
events.description: Celebrate Mom with fierce queens, tasty brunch, and nonstop laughs and vibes at our Mother's Day Drag Brunch!

events.title: Night Moves: Burlesque You Can Savor
events.description: A sumptuous evening of burlesque you can savor, featuring award winning entertainers performing the art of longform tease.

events.title: Sausage Fest
events.description: Sausage Fest is an All Drag King Show featuring New Orleans' Biggest and Best Kings! Show includes Hot Dog Dinner with Toppings Bar!

events.title: The "Drive In": A Halloween Horror Burlesque Show
events.description: Everything you love about The Drive In Movies, Halloween, Horror Films and Burlesque all wrapped up into one mind-blowing experience!

events.title: The Blood & Glitter Burlesque Spookshow
events.description: Join NOLA's hottest horror buffs for an evening of horror-themed burlesque, drag, sideshow & more!

events.title: How the Drag Queens Stole Christmas
events.description: A Holiday Cabaret to make the Yuletide Gay! The Grinch like you've never seen before...
